title: Zero In 30-Day Gel Diffuser, Natural Citronella, Mosquito Repeller, Indoor and Outdoor Use, Bee Safe, Travel Size
features: CITRONELLA FRAGRANCE: Made with natural citronella oil to keep mosquitoes and biting insects at bay for up to 30 days, and add the scent of summer to your home environment
BEE SAFE: A Bee Safe product that will not harm bees and other important pollinating insects
ADJUSTABLE: 2 levels of scent-release to suit treatment areas of different sizes. Close cap to conserve when out of use.
MODERN: Attractive flip-top design with vibrant yellow citronella gel for use on table-tops and counters
TRAVEL SIZE: Portable design for use anywhere in the home and easily transportable for holiday travel in the UK and abroad
INDOORS AND OUT: Effective insect control around the home or conservatory, as well as on patios, porches, terraces, and balconies in gardens. Ideal for offices, caravans, bathrooms, and holiday homes
description: From the manufacturer Zero In TOOLS Key Features of the Item good citronella plant oil has been used for centuries by many different cultures around the world to keep flying and biting insects at bay. The Bee Safe 30-Day Gel Diffuser from Zero In is ideal for use in and around homes and gardens, infusing the air with a pleasant, good citronella fragrance and the scent of summer. Diffusion from the compact, travel- design can be adjusted to suit the size of the room-space someone are treating, making it the perfect fit for kitchens, conservatories, and patios alike. Remove foil before use.
